claims.claim: OCR engines for Hebrew: Tesseract (heb traineddata, LSTM, good for 300 DPI+ clean print); Google Cloud Vision Document Text Detection (good, Hebrew via languageHints 'iw' legacy code, not 'he'); AWS Textract does NOT support Hebrew (Latin-script languages only: EN/ES/DE/IT/FR/PT); Azure AI Vision Read Hebrew not in the official printed-OCR list (verify); Claude Vision (claude-sonnet-4-6 / claude-opus-4-8) good with prompt guidance
claims.raw_snippet: Tesseract heb LSTM 300 DPI; Google Cloud Vision languageHints iw not he; AWS Textract Latin-script only EN ES DE IT FR PT no Hebrew; Azure Read Hebrew not in printed-OCR list; Claude Vision claude-sonnet-4-6 claude-opus-4-8

claims.claim: Israeli forms recognized include Tofes 106 (annual salary summary), Tofes 857, Tofes 100; the Israeli ID (teudat zehut) check digit uses the standard Luhn-style alternating x1/x2 algorithm on a left-zero-padded 9-digit number
claims.raw_snippet: טופס 106 טופס 857 טופס 100; מספר זהות ספרת ביקורת אלגוריתם לון; Israeli ID check digit Luhn

claims.claim: Hebrew OCR preprocessing: nikud Unicode range U+0591-U+05C7, sofit normalization, bidi Cf-category stripping; Tesseract language code 'heb', Google Cloud Vision languageHints 'iw' for Hebrew
claims.raw_snippet: nikud U+0591-U+05C7; sofit; Cf strip; Tesseract heb; Google Cloud Vision iw
